info.title: WapuPay API
info.description:
WapuPay is a platform that allows users to pay in local currency (ARS, BRL) using cryptocurrency (USDT) as the underlying asset.

## Authentication

Two schemes are supported:
- **Bearer JWT** — obtained via `POST /users/login`. Short-lived; refresh with `GET /users/refresh`.
- **API Key** — header `X-API-Key`. Requires `api_enabled = true` on the user account.

> Never send both schemes at once — the server returns `400`.

## Rate Limiting

API Key requests: **60 requests / 60 seconds** (sliding window). Exceeding returns `429`.

## Error Format

All errors return `{ "error": "message" }`.

---

🇦🇷 [Versión en español](/api-docs)

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API token generated via POST /users/api-token. Requires api_enabled=true on account.

get.description: Returns current exchange rates. No authentication required.
Returns all supported countries. No authentication required.
Application-wide configuration values. No authentication required.
Download a receipt or file from S3 storage. Requires JWT.

post.description: Authenticate with email/password or magic-link `temp_password`. Returns JWT and sets `refresh_cookie`.

get.description: Generate a new JWT access token using the `refresh_cookie`. Cookie must be sent with the request.

post.description: Send an email verification link. No authentication required.

get.description: Verify email using the token received by email.

post.description: Trigger a password recovery email. No authentication required.
Reset user password using the recovery token sent by email.
Send a passwordless magic-link login email. Email must be verified. No authentication required.
Check if a username is valid and available (3–20 chars, unique). No authentication required.
Generate a new API token for server-to-server use. If a token already exists it is rotated. The plaintext token is returned **only once** — store it securely. Requires `api_enabled = true`.

delete.description: Immediately revoke the user's current API token.

get.description: Check the current API token status without exposing the token value.
Returns all home screen data: balance, rates, settings, and account status.
Returns the user's monthly spending limits based on KYC tier. All amounts in USDT.
Returns the authenticated user's profile data.

patch.description: Update profile fields. All fields are optional.

get.description: Returns language, beta, and currency preferences.

patch.description: Update language, beta mode, or favorite currency. All fields optional.

post.description: Returns the user's referral link and code, creating one if it doesn't exist.

get.description: Get a single transaction by UUID or numeric ID. For Lightning deposits with PENDING status, the invoice is checked in real-time and may return COMPLETED.

patch.description: Update a transaction's status. Currently only `CANCELED` is user-actionable.

get.description: Get all transactions for the authenticated user, ordered by date descending.

post.description: Create a new outgoing payment transaction. Supports `fiat_transfer`, `fast_fiat_transfer`, and `qr_payment` types.

alias.description: Bank alias/CBU — required for fiat_transfer and fast_fiat_transfer

qr_image_url.description: QR image URL — required for qr_payment

400.description: Validation error (insufficient funds, invalid alias, limits exceeded, etc.)

post.description: Preview the USDT cost, fee, and exchange rate for a hypothetical transaction — without creating it.
Transfer USDT directly to another WapuPay user by username.

400.description: Receiver not found or insufficient balance

post.description: Initiate a cryptocurrency (USDT/USDC) deposit via on-chain networks. Returns a pending transaction with the destination address.

201.description: Deposit pending — send funds to address_destination

post.description: Generate a Lightning Network invoice to deposit SAT. The deposit is auto-confirmed when the invoice is paid.
Initiate a cryptocurrency withdrawal to an external blockchain address.

get.description: Get the current user's contacts. Optionally filter by type.

post.description: Mark or unmark a contact as favourite.

get.description: LNURL-pay metadata endpoint used by Lightning wallets to discover payment parameters. Lightning address format: `<username>@wapu.app`.
Generate a Lightning invoice for the given user. Called by the payer's wallet after fetching LNURL metadata.

tags.name: Utils
tags.description: Health check, exchange rates, countries, settings

tags.name: Auth & Session
tags.description: Login, token refresh, email verification, password recovery

tags.name: API Token
tags.description: Generate and manage API keys for server-to-server integrations

tags.name: Transactions
tags.description: Create and manage payment transactions (fiat transfers, QR payments, inner transfers)

tags.name: Lightning Address
tags.description: LNURL-pay protocol endpoints for <username>@wapu.app Lightning addresses
